case_title: LUNA, PACING E. et al VS LUNA, JOHN

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL TO CARLOS LUNA RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUNA, PACING E. LUNA, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA, JOHN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LUNA, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LUNA, PACING E. LUNA, CARLOS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JOHN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LUNA, PACING E. LUNA, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LUNA, JOHN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LUNA, PACING E. LUNA, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-29-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-26-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JOHN
UNTIMELY, NOT SERVED 15 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
